overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link traversing a misty, rain-soaked mountain trail. The character runs through open grassy meadows, passes between large rock formations, and approaches distant forested mountains in an atmospheric open-world environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: running steadily through open meadow toward rocky outcrop in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of tall evergreen pine trees silhouetted against the misty sky
lush green grass covering rolling terrain with small wildflowers
hazy mountain peaks visible through the rain and fog in the background
massive weathered boulder formation at the edge of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy meadow during a light rain shower. Tall pine trees stand in the middle distance while misty mountains loom in the far background. The character runs forward along a narrow dirt trail through the green grass, approaching a large rock outcrop on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass between large boulder formations

events.description: enters narrow rocky corridor with large boulders flanking both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating through the confined rocky passage between tall boulder walls

entered.detail: tall vertical rock face forming the left wall of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow rocky corridor where massive boulder walls rise on both sides of the trail. The previously visible pine trees and distant mountains are now obscured by the rock formations. The character continues running through the confined passage as rain falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approaching forested mountain range

events.description: exits the rocky corridor into expansive open plains with forested mountains visible ahead
path curves slightly to the left as the terrain rises toward the forested ridge

agents.ego_description: running across open plains toward distant forested mountains while following the winding trail

entered.detail: dense pine forest covering mountain slopes in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the rocky passage into broad open grasslands. Forested mountains become visible in the distance ahead, creating a new focal point. The trail curves gently left as it ascends toward the tree-covered ridges, with the rain continuing to fall across the expansive landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, rain-swept meadow into a confined rocky passage. It begins with the character running along a narrow dirt trail through wide green grass, with tall pine trees and misty mountains visible in the distance under a light rain shower. As the character advances, the open landscape gradually tightens, drawing closer to a large rock outcrop on the right. The scene then shifts into a narrow rocky corridor where massive boulder walls rise on both sides, obscuring the distant horizon and trees. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the character continues running through the confined passage amidst a steady rainfall.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a confined rocky passage into a vast, rain-swept highland. It begins with the character emerging from the narrow stone corridor, immediately opening up into broad, expansive grasslands. As the camera moves forward, the horizon expands to reveal distant forested mountains that establish a new focal point ahead. The scene then shifts as the trail curves gently to the left, ascending steadily toward the tree-covered ridges while rain continues to fall across the open landscape.
